title: Refresh or archive design/claude-tasks-integration.md for runner-neutral model
description:
docs/design/claude-tasks-integration.md (Jan, Claude-specific) predates the runner-neutral shift. Same treatment as the swarm-architecture doc: update to the current model (harness-orchestrated, Claude + Codex, no standalone 'tk run') cross-referencing skills/ticks/references/agent-runner.md, OR prepend an 'Archived / superseded by <pointer>' banner if purely historical.

FILE SAFETY: edits only this file. No code, no tests.
acceptance_criteria: docs/design/claude-tasks-integration.md either updated to current runner-neutral orchestration language or clearly marked archived/superseded with a pointer
